title: pimelea longifolia
intro: Pimelea longifolia, also known as Long-leaved Rice Flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in Indigenous Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pimelea longifolia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. Pimelea longifolia is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or poultice, and is used topically or internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
